Describe the sequence of actions the person takes to interact with and open the stove.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person gestures towards the stove with cushion-like objects on top; at 6s, the person touches the stove and points to the door while baskets appear; at 12s, the person grasps the handle of the left-side stove door; at 14s, the stove door is fully open revealing ash and a grate inside.

question: Describe how the objects on and around the stove change throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, two round grey cushion-like objects sit on the stove top; at 6s, woven wicker baskets appear near the stove while the person points; at 10s, the person places a hand on one of the round objects; at 18s, metal cooking pots appear on the stovetop replacing previous items.
